summary: Thread an optional `--db` flag through every `--apply`-capable automation command into the audit-write path.
reason: Before this patch, `automation-audit --db` was honored on read but `attachAutomationAudit` always wrote to the per-user default path. A user pointing at a custom audit store would see an empty list because writes landed elsewhere. The flag now defaults to the per-user store and travels through the audit signature so reads and writes share the same path.
validated_outcome: go test ./internal/cli, go build, and verify-skill all pass; --db is documented uniformly on auto-negate, auto-promote, budget-rebalance, and bid-rules apply.
